loan_contract_no.default: select max(loan_contract_no) from sc_lon_m_contract where loan_type = 'ส' and begining_of_contract >= sysdate - 3
loan_contract_no.text: เลขที่สัญญา

text3.text: ประชุมวันที่

root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ) as loan_approve_amount_thai, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as start_keep_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , 'SD') as start_keep_day, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , 'MONTH') as start_keep_month, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , 'YYYY') as start_keep_year, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as begining_of_contract, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'SD') as begining_of_day, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'YYYY') as begining_of_year, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'MONTH') as begining_of_month, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , '!text1_1!' as text1, '!text2_1!' as text2, '!text3_1!' as text3, sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control )as group_control_name, sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no, si_security_user.user_name, decode( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , 'ส' , sc_cnt_m_coop.assit_manager , sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name ) as manager_name
FROM sc_lon_m_contract , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid, si_security_user , sc_cnt_m_coop WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id = si_security_user.user_id) /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'ส65000249' ) -- and ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract >= '04/03/2022' )
